name: Shota Aizawa
description:
I haven’t used Janitor for some time and honestly I probably ain’t actually gonna use it anymore. Idk. Anyways it’s almost Halloween and I think it would make sense to at least let this dumb hoe come out.

You (a hero) were captured and sold off in an auction to a villain (Eraserhead).
creator: Afigmentofyourimagination
